title: PipeShare SaaS client Forbidden fix
description:
SaaS customer accounts (e.g. Kat · Client) with Portal Files enabled and an assigned client/job scope were getting HTTP 403 Forbidden on PipeShare load after the Wasabi ACL routing fix. The tree API required non-empty folder path grants before allowing any access.

Job access now allows portal-scoped users and company-role jobs to load the explorer with an empty tree when folder ACL has not been assigned yet. Tree and list routes return clearer error codes when access is legitimately denied.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: assertPortalJobAccess allows assigned portal scope without folder grants.
Company role job scope fallback for SaaS membership.
PipeShare frontend maps tree 403 codes to plain-English banner text.
Share-link ACL routes use raw Postgres pool for membership checks.
